message:
feat(policy_dsl): add bridge compiler from PolicyRuleMatch to RulePredicate (ft-2d30k)

Adds compile_rule_match() to convert existing flat PolicyRuleMatch criteria
into composable RulePredicate AST, compile_policy_rule() for full PolicyRule
conversion, and decompile_to_match() for reverse (flat-AND-only) decompilation.
Enables backwards-compatible migration: existing TOML rules work through the
new DSL evaluator. 8 new unit tests (55 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
